epics.Description: Close beta-critical storage and enforcement gaps so production behavior is durable, deterministic, and fail-closed.
Ship tenant-safe authn/authz and operational key controls required for public beta operations.
Provide stable agent scaffolding, SDK/provider-kit distribution, and installability guarantees for external developers.
Deliver deterministic onboarding from signup to first paid call with measurable activation SLOs.
Harden wallet bootstrap and x402 execution lifecycle for idempotent, auditable, and reversible paid runs.
Enforce strict intent/request binding and deterministic evidence replay for all side-effecting economic actions.
Run production as independent API/worker/maintenance roles with hard readiness, canaries, and rollback drills.
Operationalize dispute/settlement triage, incident response, and abuse handling for live external tenants.
Coordinate package distribution, launch gates, and design-partner graduation into public beta.

tickets.Summary: Fix provider publication/listing PG durability parity
tickets.Description: Replace in-memory publication/listing writes on beta-critical paths with Postgres-backed persistence and deterministic read models.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Provider publication and listing state survives process restart; parity tests pass in memory and pg modes; no behavior drift on existing API contracts.

tickets.Summary: Close finance reconciliation PG parity gap
tickets.Description: Align reconciliation and triage read/write paths so production PG mode has full feature parity with local mode.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Reconciliation triage endpoints return complete data in PG mode; regression tests cover mismatch scenarios and fail closed on missing evidence.

tickets.Summary: Add x402 webhook upsert op-kind parity
tickets.Description: Implement missing `X402_WEBHOOK_ENDPOINT_UPSERT` op-kind support across storage adapters and validation paths.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Webhook endpoint upsert succeeds in supported environments; op-kind validation is consistent across adapters; negative tests assert deterministic reject codes.

tickets.Summary: Remove ops token query-param auth path
tickets.Description: Delete query-parameter auth fallback and require header/session-based auth for all ops surfaces.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: All ops endpoints reject query-param token auth; audit log verifies header/session auth only; compatibility note published with migration guidance.

tickets.Summary: Enforce single release version source of truth
tickets.Description: Bind `package.json` and `NOOTERRA_VERSION` through a gate that blocks release on mismatch.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Release checks fail when versions differ; release artifact embeds a single canonical version string; changelog references same version.

tickets.Summary: Harden external conformance binary resolution
tickets.Description: Make conformance commands resolve runtime binaries deterministically for external users without hidden local assumptions.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Conformance commands run from fresh external install; path resolution errors emit actionable, stable diagnostics; CI includes external-path smoke.

tickets.Summary: Stabilize auth-mode and signup/login contract
tickets.Description: Freeze and test public auth-mode discovery and tenant login/signup contract behavior across enabled modes.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Auth-mode endpoint and login/signup routes pass contract tests for enabled modes; disabled modes fail closed with stable reason codes.

tickets.Summary: Enforce tenant-scoped RBAC on ops routes
tickets.Description: Apply explicit tenant and role checks across operational endpoints used by onboarding and support.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Unauthorized role access is denied on every guarded route; cross-tenant access attempts fail deterministically and are audit logged.

tickets.Summary: Add OTP/session replay protections
tickets.Description: Add nonce, expiry, and replay detection to OTP/session flows with explicit machine-readable reject reasons.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Expired/replayed OTP/session tokens are rejected with stable reason codes; success path unaffected; tests cover clock skew boundaries.

tickets.Summary: Automate key rotation and revoke drill
tickets.Description: Codify and test key rotation plus revoke workflows with rollback-safe runbook steps.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Rotation and revoke drills pass in staging; previously issued artifacts remain verifiable; emergency rollback path is documented and tested.

tickets.Summary: Stabilize `nooterra agent init` scaffold output
tickets.Description: Ensure scaffolded projects include runnable policy, tests, and manifest defaults that pass first-run smoke.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Fresh scaffold completes install and local run without manual edits; generated tests pass; scaffold manifest is schema-valid.

tickets.Summary: Publish official JS SDK beta channel
tickets.Description: Ship JS SDK with pinned examples for first verified run and stable semantic versioning.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: SDK package is published and installable; first-run example succeeds against staging; version tags map to release artifacts.

tickets.Summary: Publish provider-kit package and template
tickets.Description: Package provider-tool starter with deterministic defaults and compatibility checks.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Provider kit installs from npm and generates a working paid-tool provider; conformance baseline passes on generated project.

tickets.Summary: Add external install matrix CI gate
tickets.Description: Gate release on clean external install matrix for `npm`, `npx`, python SDK smoke, and CLI command surface.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: CI matrix passes in clean environments; failures include direct remediation hints; release is blocked if any install lane regresses.

tickets.Summary: Add agent build pipeline smoke test
tickets.Description: Add CI flow that scaffolds an agent, runs it, executes an intent/work-order cycle, and verifies settlement retrieval.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Pipeline smoke succeeds on main branch; run emits replay-pack and settlement evidence links; failures are deterministic and triaged.

tickets.Summary: Freeze beta onboarding API profile
tickets.Description: Freeze the beta onboarding route profile and publish compatibility constraints for clients.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Beta onboarding profile doc is published with route list and required fields; API contract tests enforce compatibility.

tickets.Summary: Implement deterministic onboarding step journal
tickets.Description: Track onboarding progression with step-level machine-readable outcomes and deterministic failure categories.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Onboarding journal output includes stable step IDs and outcomes; rerun under same inputs yields equivalent journal semantics.

tickets.Summary: Deliver first-paid-call guided remediation flow
tickets.Description: Implement guided first-paid-call flow that maps failed steps to explicit remediation actions.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: At least 90% of scripted first-paid-call failures produce actionable remediation guidance; successful flow reaches verified payment and settlement evidence.

tickets.Summary: Enforce onboarding metrics and SLO dashboards
tickets.Description: Expose onboarding metrics and tie p50/p95 activation SLOs to alerting thresholds.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Metrics endpoint reports onboarding funnel stages; SLO alerts trigger for threshold breaches; weekly trend report auto-generated.

tickets.Summary: Ship design-partner onboarding runbook
tickets.Description: Create an operator runbook for onboarding design partners, including escalation and rollback actions.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Runbook is used in at least one dry-run with full checklist completion; escalation contacts and SLAs are explicit and tested.

tickets.Summary: Harden wallet bootstrap and funding flows
tickets.Description: Stabilize wallet bootstrap and funding endpoints across hosted onboarding and kernel-level x402 wallet setup.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Wallet bootstrap and funding pass success/failure matrix; no partial funded state without explicit status evidence; retries are idempotent.

tickets.Summary: Add authorize-payment idempotency matrix
tickets.Description: Cover duplicate, reordered, and replayed authorization attempts with deterministic idempotent outcomes.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Authorization replay matrix passes with no double-authorization; duplicate requests return deterministic prior result binding.

tickets.Summary: Harden verify/reversal/dispute handoff
tickets.Description: Ensure verify and reversal outcomes align with dispute opening and settlement state transitions.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Verify/reversal/dispute transitions are replay-safe and append-only; inconsistent transitions fail with stable reject codes.

tickets.Summary: Set settlement replay and explainability latency budgets
tickets.Description: Measure and enforce p95 latency budgets for settlement replay/evaluate/explainability retrieval paths.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Latency budgets are documented and monitored; budget regressions trigger alerts and release gate warnings.

tickets.Summary: Implement degraded payment-rail fail-closed mode
tickets.Description: Add explicit degraded mode behavior for partial rail outages that preserves fund safety and evidence completeness.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Rail outage simulations deny unsafe actions, preserve existing funds, and emit deterministic outage reason codes.

tickets.Summary: Freeze intent contract schema and fixtures
tickets.Description: Lock intent contract shape and canonical hashing fixtures for beta compatibility.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Intent schema and fixtures are versioned; canonical hashes are stable across repeated runs; compatibility checks run in CI.

tickets.Summary: Enforce strict request binding for side-effect routes
tickets.Description: Require strict request hash/path/method binding on all side-effecting routes and remove permissive legacy edges.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Side-effect requests without valid strict binding are rejected deterministically; read-only and compute paths preserve backward compatibility.

tickets.Summary: Require replay-pack verification on paid runs
tickets.Description: Bind paid-run completion to replay-pack generation and verification APIs for auditability.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Every paid run has replay-pack and verification status retrievable by API; missing replay-pack blocks final success verdict.

tickets.Summary: Add deterministic artifact hash soak gate
tickets.Description: Run repeated export/replay cycles and assert stable artifact hashes and decision fingerprints.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Equivalent runs produce stable semantic hashes across soak iterations; drift triggers gate failure with artifact diff pointers.

tickets.Summary: Add evidence-mismatch fail-closed regression suite
tickets.Description: Prove settlement/dispute operations fail closed when evidence hash bindings are missing or mismatched.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Regression suite blocks merges on evidence mismatch acceptance; reject codes remain stable for integration consumers.

tickets.Summary: Deploy split API/worker/maintenance topology
tickets.Description: Run API, workers, and maintenance roles as independent processes with explicit startup and readiness checks.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Topology deploy is documented and repeatable; each role has independent health signal; worker/maintenance outages do not hide API health state.

tickets.Summary: Deepen health/readiness/metrics checks
tickets.Description: Add component-level readiness checks and standardized metrics labels for DB, queues, and external dependencies.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Readiness reports component detail with stable schema; alerting can isolate component failures without ambiguous status.

tickets.Summary: Add queue retry and dead-letter guardrails
tickets.Description: Implement bounded retries, dead-letter capture, and alerting for queue-backed work paths.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Failed jobs move to dead-letter with evidence context; retry limits prevent infinite loops; alerts fire on dead-letter growth.

tickets.Summary: Run synthetic paid-flow canaries
tickets.Description: Schedule synthetic end-to-end canaries covering onboarding, paid call, settlement, and evidence retrieval.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Canary runs at fixed cadence with signed reports; any hard-step failure pages on-call and blocks promotion.

tickets.Summary: Run rollback drill and incident packet signing
tickets.Description: Perform rollback rehearsal and produce signed incident packet proving recovery path viability.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Rollback drill completes within defined window; incident packet includes timeline, checks, and signed artifact hashes.

tickets.Summary: Ship dispute and settlement ops control surface
tickets.Description: Provide operator views/API bundles for active disputes, settlement anomalies, and evidence drill-down.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Ops surface supports triage without direct DB access; every action links to immutable evidence references.

tickets.Summary: Define incident severity model and on-call routing
tickets.Description: Formalize severity classes, escalation times, and routing policies for reliability, payment, and security incidents.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Severity model is documented and tested in tabletop drill; alert routing confirms correct responder assignment.

tickets.Summary: Publish status page and RCA templates
tickets.Description: Implement public/internal status communication templates and enforce RCA completion workflow.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Status updates follow defined cadence; RCA template includes root cause, corrective actions, and verification links.

tickets.Summary: Deliver abuse and fraud triage playbook
tickets.Description: Define abuse intake, fraud escalation, and tenant containment actions with evidence preservation requirements.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Abuse/fraud playbook covers detection, containment, escalation, and recovery; drill validates timing and evidence capture.

tickets.Summary: Unify beta package distribution surface
tickets.Description: Align CLI, SDK, provider-kit, and quickstart docs into a single externally consistent beta install path.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: External team can install and run beta flow using one quickstart path; package/version matrix is internally consistent.

tickets.Summary: Automate design-partner launch packets
tickets.Description: Generate tenant-specific launch packets with onboarding status, gates, and support contacts.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Launch packet generation is automated and auditable; packet includes onboarding proof, gate status, and escalation routes.

tickets.Summary: Implement beta promotion gate bundle
tickets.Description: Create a single beta promotion gate command bundle that aggregates onboarding, install, reliability, and evidence gates.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Promotion command emits machine-readable report with blocking issues; beta release is blocked unless all required gates pass.

tickets.Summary: Set public beta pricing and quota guardrails
tickets.Description: Define beta usage limits, spend caps, and automatic throttles to bound financial and abuse risk.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Quota and spend controls enforce configured limits; over-limit flows return deterministic responses and preserve settlement invariants.

tickets.Summary: Stand up beta activation funnel and weekly ops review
tickets.Description: Implement activation dashboard and weekly review cadence for onboarding, reliability, and economic health metrics.
tickets.Acceptance Criteria: Weekly review packet auto-generates with trend deltas; owners and follow-ups are tracked per metric regression.
